{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194123ADCE743ACDC3272A218A"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7548763752995554072","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我自己的书怎么都得给个五星[学会了]，好了进入正题，本书的题材是规则怪谈，所以本书有什么逻辑错误，衔接不好，人物写得像人机，不够恐怖什么的，都欢迎指正，作者保证不红温[奸笑]，另外，对本书有书有什么建议可以多多评论，例如希望作者把剧情往哪里推，添加什么角色，还有角色的名字怎么起（绝对不是因为作者是起名废[奸笑]）之类。最后感谢大家对本书的支持，蟹蟹啦[笑]","text_exts":[{"e":36,"s":32,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774266083272A218A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227548763752995554072%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227541692633739971609%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757587012,"group_id":"7541692633739971609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没什么好说的，纯湊字数","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwcyaAkLd9joni6Lu53SiJKGZ4apELaCnS2w2j6gARmA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1c68f866fad148d692a2618aff79159e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788489&x-signature=F5H3yJDi7lANprlytyTZ198dS4s%3D","user_id":"2024647863833075","user_name":"琉星锤子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2024647863833075","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7541692633739971609","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+智商在线+无女主+推理】
温馨提示：本文非国运直播类型，不会出现国家组织（主要是新手不会写）
………………
世界陷入了规则的噩梦，而我，是唯一不需要规则书的人。
我能洞悉逻辑的裂痕。从阴森的动物园，到温馨却致命的公寓，我孤身一人，利用每一个规则的漏洞艰难前行。
我破解餐馆的菜单，扭曲药厂的配方，不是为了成为英雄，只是为了追寻那个将我的过去彻底抹去的元凶。
当所有线索都指向终点，我握着它亲手写下的规则，轻声问道：
“现在，轮到我来制定规则了，对吗？”
如果对作品有什么意见尽管评论，不要在乎作者的情绪哈！[狗头]","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o0958ca4f879c5d671ae16039fa8f56ce~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"琉星锤子","author_id":"","book_id":"7541692633739971609","book_name":"规则怪谈：从动物园开始入局","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7541692640446644761","read_count":"656","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"262833"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"110","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,求生,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0958ca4f879c5d671ae16039fa8f56ce~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450083&x-signature=pzKe6jVFwu0KzTk%2FiJ8LqFHcK0E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2024647863833075","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194123ADCE743ACDC3272A218A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":2496},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1757587253,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597672982189867800","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我来凑个数，前期的主角没有深度思考规则，而且好多规则没有意义，只是让主角无意义的而且是时间很短的遵守规则像个人偶，诡异没有太多脑子，只有诡异的本性，当然后期的人物刻画与前面的呼应也是非常不错的[吃瓜]加油作者大大"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768973354,"group_id":"7541692633739971609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更3000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8fjZ3Ekb0hgzs4kTmJJ74bKWQGMyXNlwZVgzsB+2y1x","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c7651ce533984f9fb5ac4cc33a793c0c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795172&x-signature=o%2Fzosgknhi%2FT4uA3DLMT2kaDbg4%3D","user_id":"4143438589069384","user_name":"颜无泪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4143438589069384","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7541692633739971609","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+智商在线+无女主+推理】
